rationale: Unified test runner fix to propagate errors from withTransaction callback per UTF spec; test infrastructure fix.
Add explicit resource management (using/await using) support; new API feature, not a spec conformance issue.
Encryption contexts can outlive internal _mongocrypt_t causing segfaults; C++ memory management bug, not a spec behavior rule.
Kerberos: allow callers to specify protect flag on unwrap; API enhancement, not a spec conformance issue.
enableUtf8Validation on cursors broken in 6.8.0; regression bug, no specific BSON spec rule violated.
Node v22.7.0 produces invalid UTF-8 strings causing malformed BSON; upstream Node.js bug, not a driver spec violation.
Change in cursor behavior not returning all documents in 6.8.0; regression from lazy BSON parsing, not a spec rule violation.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1256 Improvement; CSOT/maxTimeMS handling for explain helpers, spec rollout not a bug.
Improve BSON serialization performance with WeakMap cache; performance optimization, no behavior change.
Driver doesn't set moreToCome bit for w:0 writes; OP_MSG spec requires fire-and-forget bit for unacknowledged writes.
Change streams resume infinitely after server-side cursor init failure; implementation bug with no specific spec rule violated.
Sockets not closed on read/write timeout errors; implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
bulkWrite doesn't resolve and connection not returned to pool; implementation hang bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Remove links to RST spec files and change to MD; documentation/link maintenance, not a spec conformance issue.
Depends on DRIVERS-604; re-syncing APM tests for removed upsert/multi fields with default values.
CSOT deprecated options handling; spec-compliance label, implementing CSOT spec timeout priority rules.
CSOT FLE cursor refresh passes remainingTimeMS instead of timeoutContext; CSOT implementation bug, not a spec rule.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2769 Improvement; spec rollout to not validate SASL mechanisms, proactive change not a bug.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2900; testing that durations are included on pool events per spec.
GridFS deleteMany passes timeoutMS to predicate not options; CSOT implementation bug, thin description.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1368 Bug; fixing URI options spec tests that specify wrong empty options.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2647 Bug; drivers must unpin connections when ending sessions per load balancer spec.
Lazily cache ObjectId hex string; performance/memory improvement, no spec behavior change.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2926 Improvement; adding BSON Binary Vector Subtype support per spec rollout.
Compression level parameter not passed through in zstd binding; dependency/packaging bug, not a spec conformance issue.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2223 Bug; updating CMAP spec test to work with different pool implementations.
SizedMessageTransform not using readableObjectMode; implementation bug with stream handling, no spec rule violated.
Remove deprecated node-bindings dependency; dependency/packaging improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Remove EOL Node 12 from zstd support matrix; build/CI maintenance, not a spec conformance issue.
Remove symbol class properties; internal refactoring, no behavior change, not a spec deviation.
BSON.calculateObjectSize doesn't handle BigInt; BSON spec defines type encoding and size calculations.
Implement retry on DNS TIMEOUT failures; new resilience feature, no existing spec rule violated.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2525; adding command logging test for unacknowledged write behavior.
Concurrent calls to MongoClient.close() throw; implementation concurrency bug, no spec rule violated.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2960 Bug; clarifying spec behavior for reauthentication + speculative auth combination.
Native packages fail to bundle in webpack; build/bundling issue, not a spec conformance problem.
Isolate and warm-up benchmarks; CI/performance tooling improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Add Alpine linux support for Node libmongocrypt bindings; platform support/build issue, not a spec conformance issue.
Write concern parameter lost during resolveOptions with timeoutMS; CSOT implementation bug, no spec-defined behavior violated.
Cannot install mongodb-client-encryption on Alpine Linux; build/platform issue, not a spec conformance problem.
TypeScript type doesn't include Document[] for findOneAndUpdate update param; TypeScript typing gap, not a spec bug.
Coverage task depends on performance tests; CI infrastructure improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3058 Improvement; syncing spec tests for resume token stability.
util/types import breaks bundling with node polyfill; build/bundling regression, not a spec conformance issue.
OIDC machine workflow not setting cached access token on new connections; OIDC auth spec requires token reuse.
Proxy socket unhandled promise rejection for KMS requests; implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
useBigInt64 deserializes negative Int64 as positive; BSON spec defines Int64 as signed 64-bit integer.
AWS SDK peer dependency compat version changed; dependency/packaging issue, not a spec conformance problem.
Add CPU baseline benchmark for scaling results; benchmarking/performance tooling improvement, no spec involvement.
bsonBench installs bson versions in tmp directory; benchmarking/performance tooling improvement, no spec rule.
